case_title: PELZER, BILL G. VS PITZER, DELENE ANN et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PITZER, DELENE ANN

IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HINES, JOHN DEFENDANT DELENE ANN PITZER FAILED TO APPEAR; CASE OFF CALENDARED AS TO HER; PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE DENIED AS UNTIMELY.
